creator: andrew.george.hammond@gmail.com
text:
The slony1 package includes sgml documentation. However, the man page for the slon is not installed.

[ahammond@ahammond /usr/ports/databases/slony129]$ which slon
/usr/local/bin/slon
[ahammond@ahammond /usr/ports/databases/slony129]$ man slon
No manual entry for slon

How-To-Repeat: Install slony, and try to RTFM.
